meaning: adj.非经济的 无实用价值的
examples: Here are some key noneconomic element of compensation.
But against these "economic" benefits, there are always "noneconomic" costs.
Noneconomic compensation matters to top-flight lawyers — otherwise, they would have long ago fled to investment Banks.
Noneconomic circumstances such as disease, ( see story), will continue to figure heavily in Africa and elsewhere.
Think, too, about the noneconomic aspects of transferring, warns Ken Jobe.
